items.title: The 16 Best Amazon Prime Day Deals Under $30 We've Found
items.summary: Everything is expensive. Treat yourself to one of these WIRED-tested and -approved Prime Day picks under $30.

items.title: Best Prime Day Deals on Yoto Players and Accessories
items.summary: Between Prime Day deal and the screen-free technology, the Yoto Player is a great gift you can get the kids in your life without any guilt.

items.title: Best Prime Day Streaming Deals I’ve Found (2026): HBO, Paramount Plus
items.summary: Prime Day isn’t just about cheap TVs. It's also about cheap stuff to watch on your cheap TV.

items.title: Superhuman acquires AI detection startup GPTZero
items.summary: Superhuman, which also has an AI detection tool as part of Grammarly, has snapped up GPTZero.

items.title: After betting the firm on Anthropic, Menlo Ventures raises victorious $3B fund
items.summary: Menlo has created a solid rep for itself as an AI investor, all based on one gutsy $750 million move in 2024.

items.title: Klue says hackers stole credential from 2022 that led to customer data breaches
items.summary: It's unclear why Klue had not revoked the credential after the limited pilot, which hackers then used to breach a system holding keys for accessing customers' data.

items.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
items.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

items.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
items.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

items.title: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
items.summary: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.

items.title: CFTC sues Kentucky over actions against prediction markets, making it first red state to face federal scrutiny
items.summary: The commission has now sued nine states in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.

items.title: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
items.summary: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.

items.title: SpaceX seeing some interest from short sellers, but many still afraid to bet against Musk
items.summary: About 40 million SpaceX shares are sold short, roughly 5% to 7% of the shares that are publicly available to trade, according to an estimate by S3 Partners.

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

items.title: White House bats down speculation that Trump got access to Eli Lilly obesity drug for ‘compassionate use’
items.summary: White House officials on Tuesday shot down a report speculating that President Trump gained access to the retatrutide weight-loss drug under the Food and Drug Administration’s (FDA) “compassionate use program.” The retatrutide drug is manufactured by Eli Lilly and is not FDA approved, however, one person gained access to the prescription through a program that…

items.title: Last American hantavirus cruise ship passenger released from quarantine
items.summary: As of Sunday, all U.S. citizens on a cruise ship that was the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak are out of quarantine, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). The 18 Americans onboard the M/V Hondius cruise ship have since completed their 42-day monitoring period, the CDC noted. Those individuals isolated…

items.title: M&M’s without artificial dyes are coming soon. These other brands are following suit
items.summary: Several companies have announced plans or taken steps to remove artificial dyes from their products.

items.title: Dollar Recovers as Euro Retreats on Dovish Lagarde Comments

items.title: Scientists open a million-year-old time capsule hidden beneath New Zealand
items.summary: A cave in New Zealand has yielded fossils from a lost ecosystem that existed about 1 million years ago, including a possible flying ancestor of the kākāpō. The discovery reveals that volcanoes and climate upheaval were reshaping the country’s wildlife and driving extinctions long before humans arrived.

items.title: NASA’s Cold Atom Lab is creating one of the weirdest forms of matter in space
items.summary: NASA’s upgraded Cold Atom Lab is turning the International Space Station into a frontier for quantum research, creating ultra-cold matter that behaves in astonishing ways. The experiments could unlock new discoveries about the universe while paving the way for powerful future technologies in space and on Earth.

items.title: This emerging treatment is helping people avoid knee replacement surgery
items.summary: A minimally invasive treatment called GAE is helping people with chronic knee pain get back to gardening, cycling, and other activities without undergoing knee replacement surgery. Early studies suggest the procedure can provide years of relief by reducing inflammation inside the joint.

items.title: The ‘little brain’ may give the aging mind a big boost
items.summary: Most known for its role in movement, the cerebellum could compensate for flagging mental functions elsewhere in the brain.

items.title: Even ‘safe’ air pollution levels may affect heart health
items.summary: An imaging study found early signs of coronary artery disease in people in Canada breathing air that regulators consider clean.

items.title: A new dino fossil may solve an ancient murder mystery
items.summary: A newly-described dinosaur, Jian changmaensis, may have glided through northwestern China about 120 million years ago, wreaking havoc on birds.
